{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Seishen king
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Seishen king]] raised a fortress in Sky’s Edge.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
